items.title: The Vaunt EP is out — two songs, one jet
items.body: "Vaunt" and "Jet Pass" land as a two-song EP, with the title track performed live in the cabin — Zakir on the six-string, the whole take at altitude. The song page runs on the real performance footage, start to finish.
items.label: Hear the EP

items.title: Step inside the cabin — the 360 experience is live
items.body: The full interior of the jet, in every direction. Drag to look around or move your phone, and tap the pins: the cockpit books a flight, the crew opens their profiles, the camera books photography, and the bag gets you back to the offer that built all of this.
items.label: Step inside

items.title: Inside the beta program
items.body: Launch coverage and an original jingle performed live on the runway drove online sign-ups before the app even launched. The seal on the site marks the partnership.
items.label: The credentials

items.title: A jet brand takes seat №1
items.body: This landing page, the 360 cabin, the EP rollout, and the newsroom you're reading were built as the first delivery of the limited offer — a whole universe around one brand. $14,400 a year. Three seats total. Two remain.
items.label: See the offer
